system.description:
Tactical Dreadnought Armour, commonly known as Terminator Armour, is the most powerful personal armor available to the Adeptus Astartes. These massive suits are relics from the Dark Age of Technology, combining thick ceramite plates with an exoskeleton that allows the wearer to move despite the immense weight. Each suit is a priceless artifact, maintained and revered by the Chapter.

Terminator Armour provides unparalleled protection and is equipped with a teleport homer, allowing for precision deep strikes into the heart of battle. Only the most veteran warriors of the 1st Company are honored to wear these legendary suits.

armorEffects.name: Auto-senses
points: Heightened Senses: +10 to Sight and Sound-based Awareness tests
Stacks with Lyman's Ear and Occulobe for +20 total
Immunity to photon flash and stun grenades
Called Shot becomes a Half Action

armorEffects.name: Bio-monitor & Injectors
points: +10 to tests resisting Toxic and poison effects
6 pain suppressor doses (each ignores Critical Effects for 1d10 rounds)

armorEffects.name: Nutrient Recycling
points: After 2 weeks without food, Toughness Test or 1 Fatigue
Difficulty increases every 2 weeks without food

armorEffects.name: Recoil Suppression
points: Non-Pistol ranged weapons still cannot be used in Close Combat

armorEffects.name: Giant Among Men
points: Black Carapace negates enemy attack bonus from size
Penalties to Concealment and Silent Move for heavy armour

armorEffects.name: Poor Manual Dexterity
points: -10 to delicate tasks without Astartes-designed equipment
20 min to don/remove (min 5 min with assistance)
